Clear three-column amount '8 10 10' (pounds/shillings/pence). Description is legible and matches obvious ledger item.

Two numbers '8 7' visible. Interpreted as £8 7s 0d since the first column aligns with the pounds column for other nearby entries (and 7 could be shillings). Slight uncertainty because pence column is not present.
Amount clearly reads '48 7 6' and aligns with pounds/shillings/pence columns (£48 7s 6d). Description is legible.
Two numerals '1 10' read. Interpreted as £1 10s 0d in context of other 'Do' (ditto) entries; pence column not present. Slight uncertainty because could be 1s10d but context favors £1 10s.
Three-column amount reads '9 7 3' (£9 7s 3d). Description contains locations 'Kidlington & Yarnton' and 'Rent' clearly visible.
